<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>两<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">liǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>儿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>娶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">le</rt></ruby><ruby>摩<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Mó</rt></ruby><ruby>押<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yā</rt></ruby><ruby>女<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǚ</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby>妻<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qī</rt></ruby>，<ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>名<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>叫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>俄<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">É</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">珥<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ěr</rt></ruby><ruby>巴<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bā</rt></ruby>，<ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>名<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>叫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>路<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Lù</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">li</rt></ruby><ruby>住<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhù</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">le</rt></ruby><ruby>约<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yuē</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>十<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>年<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nián</rt></ruby>。
